string.text: The Barrett SSRS (Squad Support Recoilless System) is a cutting-edge, semi-automatic grenade launcher designed for modern infantry fire support. Utilizing a proprietary recoilless mechanism, the SSRS dramatically reduces felt recoil, allowing for rapid, accurate follow-up shots. Chambered for 40mm smart and conventional grenades, it features an advanced fire control system with a built-in rangefinder and programmable airburst capability. The lightweight yet rugged polymer and titanium construction ensure battlefield durability, while its modular rail system supports a variety of optics and accessories. Designed for versatility, the SSRS excels in both direct and indirect fire roles, making it a game-changer for squad-level engagements.\n\n
Magazine for the Barrett SSRS semi-automatic grenade launcher, holds 6 VOG-25 Grenades.\n
